meaning: adj.(汽车部件等)可用螺栓固定的
examples: He was overruled by the owner, Peter Bolton, who insisted on Cool Ground running in the Gold Cup.
Mr Bolton himself was said to have been keen.
It is either very good or very bad with Bolton.
Trying to get a UN consensus may be Ambassador John Bolton's first major assignment.
Manchester Community Transport (MCT) stopped all Maytree Travel services in Bolton and Wigan at about 14:00 BST.
